Norbert's Healing Fund

Walk with us through the forest, one gentle step at a time

He is still himself.

Curious, gentle, and full of the quiet wisdom he has always carried.

In the spring of 2026, we learned that Norbert has lymphoma. He is receiving treatment and responding with the same steadiness he brings to everything. His care is intensive and ongoing. Every purchase through Norbert's Healing Fund goes directly toward his treatment.

This community gathered around kindness long before any of this began. You showed up for the truck rides, the enchanted forest stories, the quiet mornings. You are the reason Norbert's world became a book, a website, and a place for people to breathe a little easier.

If you feel moved to walk with us now, we have created a few ways to carry Norbert with you while helping to carry his treatment costs.

The vet who listened.

This is Dr. Russ, Norbert's regular vet and one of the first people in his corner. When I felt lumps under Norbert's jaw and brought him in, Dr. Russ confirmed what I feared. Then he did something just as important -- he sat with me, walked me through what it meant, and convinced me to see an oncologist. That conversation changed everything.

The woman beside him is one of his vet techs -- and one of Norbert's former camp counselors. He already loved her before any of this began. Seeing her there that day, in a completely different role, was one of those quiet reminders that the right people have a way of showing up.

The circle around Norbert has always been made of people like this. That has not changed.

"In the forest and in life, I have learned to trust the dog."

Mama Sue

Just want to send love?

You do not need to take anything home. A gift of any amount goes directly to Norbert's treatment. Every kind act reaches him in the forest.

Donate any amount
"He taught me to trust the quiet. To stay. To listen. Now it is our turn to hold the light for him."
Mama Sue

Thank you for walking with us.

This is Norbert at his oncology clinic, celebrated by the team that has walked every step of this journey with him. The birthday hat was their idea. That is the kind of care he is receiving. And this is the kind of community he has built.

Every purchase, every donation, every kind word shared with someone who might need it -- it all reaches him. He knows you are there.

With gratitude from the enchanted forest,
Mama Sue and Norbert
